history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi! We have our World Famous Fries available. Would you like to order those?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hi, I'm lactose intolerant and need a hearty meal. What do you recommend?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi! Chicken McNuggets® are a great lactose-free hearty meal option. Would you like to order that?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take the Chicken McNuggets. I can't have dairy—can I get a non-dairy drink?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! You have Chicken McNuggets® — they're lactose-free. We don't have non-dairy drinks listed here. Would you like to add fries or dessert instead?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take fries. No drink needed.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! Your order is 1 Chicken McNuggets® and Our World Famous Fries. No drinks added. Would you like to confirm this order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct. No changes needed.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed! Thank you for your purchase. Enjoy your meal.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thanks for the order! Hope the fries are crispy.

- Speak naturally like a human cashier; do not dump technical nutrition details unless asked.

- Before finalising, repeat the full order and ask for confirmation.
- If the customer mentions allergies, check allergen data from context.
